title: Actinoschoenus thouarsii
taxonomy: Actinoschoenus thouarsii is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It belongs to the genus Actinoschoenus, which consists of several species of sedges. Actinoschoenus thouarsii is further classified as a member of the subfamily Cyperoideae. This classification places it within the family Cyperaceae, which is a large and diverse group of monocotyledonous plants. Actinoschoenus thouarsii's classification helps to understand its evolutionary relationships with other sedges.

intro: Actinoschoenus thouarsii, also known as 'Thouars' Sedge, is a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae, characterized by its unique grass-like appearance and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, making it a useful remedy for treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating various health issues.
